backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the Expense type and CRUD operations (add, update, delete, get) plus query helpers for filtering by category/date/range and computing totals, with a preferred currency state.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state by adding a default `preferredCurrency` field (#USD) to the existing expenses map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—currency selector in Settings and currency formatting across the app—to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering screens, components, hooks, utilities, and constants.
frontend/ANDROID_APK.md: Guide covering environment setup, debug/release APK builds, installation methods, Internet Identity authentication, troubleshooting, and CI/CD integration for the Android app.
frontend/android/app/src/main/AndroidMan: Android manifest declaring the MainActivity with deep-link support for auth callbacks, a FileProvider, and internet/network-state permissions.
frontend/android/app/src/main/java/com/e: Minimal Capacitor BridgeActivity subclass that serves as the Android app's entry point.
frontend/android/app/src/main/res/xml/ne: Network security config allowing cleartext in development while enforcing HTTPS for IC/Internet Identity production domains.
frontend/android/variables.gradle: Gradle ext block defining SDK versions and dependency versions used across the Android build.
frontend/ARCHITECTURE.md: Architecture overview describing the frontend's screens, components, hooks, utilities, constants, and backend interface for the student expense tracker.
frontend/capacitor.config.ts: Capacitor configuration specifying the app ID, name, web dist directory, HTTPS Android scheme, and debugging options.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with a root div and module script entry point for the React app.
frontend/README.md: Brief README introducing the React/Capacitor expense tracking frontend and its development workflow.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up the TanStack Router with five routes (dashboard, add expense, expense list, calculator, settings) wrapped in a ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/calculator/Calcu: Form component for adding a single expense entry (amount, category, date, note) to a calculator session, with validation and reset on submit.
Displays the list of expense entries in the current calculator session, with formatted currency/date and a remove button for each entry.
frontend/src/components/charts/MonthlySp: Renders an area chart of daily spending totals over a month using Recharts, with an empty-state message when no data is present.
frontend/src/components/charts/WeeklySpe: Renders a bar chart of daily spending for a week using Recharts, mapping date-range day labels to expense totals with an empty-state fallback.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Catego: Displays a sorted list of expense categories with progress bars showing each category's percentage of total spending, including loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Totals: Shows two summary cards — total amount spent and average per transaction — with loading skeletons while data is fetching.
frontend/src/components/expenses/DeleteE: Alert dialog that confirms deletion of a specific expense, calling the delete mutation and showing success/error toasts on completion.
frontend/src/components/expenses/EditExp: A dialog component for editing an existing expense, pre-filling an ExpenseForm with the expense's current values and submitting updates via the useUpdateExpense mutation.
frontend/src/components/expenses/Expense: A filter UI component with two dropdowns allowing users to filter expenses by time period (week/month/all) and category.
A reusable controlled form component for creating or editing an expense, with fields for amount, category, date, and note, including client-side validation.
Displays a sorted list of expenses in cards with edit and delete actions, showing loading skeletons and an empty state when appropriate.
The main application layout wrapper that renders a sticky header with navigation, a main content outlet, and a footer, while initializing Capacitor runtime and auth bridge on mount.
frontend/src/components/layout/PrimaryNa: A navigation bar component that renders links to the main app routes (Dashboard, Add Expense, Expenses, Calculator, Settings) with active-state highlighting.
frontend/src/constants/currencies.ts: Defines supported currency codes (USD, INR, JPY), their metadata, and a helper to look up a currency option by code.
frontend/src/constants/expenseCategories: Exports a constant array of expense category value/label pairs used throughout the app for category selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrency.ts: A React hook that fetches and persists the user's preferred currency from the backend (with localStorage fallback) and exposes a mutation to update it.
frontend/src/hooks/useExpenses.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on expenses (fetch, create, update, delete), each calling the ICP backend actor and showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens and chart palette.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/screens/AddExpenseScreen.ts: Screen component that renders an expense creation form and navigates to the expenses list upon successful submission using the useCreateExpense mutation.
frontend/src/screens/CalculatorScreen.ts: Screen that lets users build a session of multiple expense entries, displays a running total, and saves all entries to the backend at once via the useCreateExpense mutation.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Dashboard screen displaying spending totals, category breakdowns, and bar/trend charts filtered by a week or month time window using fetched expense data.
frontend/src/screens/ExpenseListScreen.t: Screen that displays a filterable, paginated list of expenses with time window and category filter controls backed by the useExpenses hook.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: React settings screen component that allows users to toggle dark/light mode and select a preferred currency (USD, INR, JPY) from a grid of buttons, persisting the choice via the useCurrency hook.
frontend/src/utils/aggregations.ts: Utility functions to calculate total expense amounts and aggregate expenses grouped by day or category using bigint arithmetic.
frontend/src/utils/capacitorAuthBridge.t: Capacitor-specific bridge that handles Internet Identity authentication by opening a system browser and listening for deep-link callbacks to resolve the auth flow in native WebView contexts.
frontend/src/utils/capacitorRuntime.ts: Capacitor runtime utilities that detect if the app is running in a native Capacitor container, expose platform info, and initialize platform-specific behaviors like Android back-button handling.
frontend/src/utils/dateRanges.ts: Date utility functions for computing week/month ranges, generating day labels for intervals, and filtering expense arrays by a given time window (week, month, or all).
frontend/src/utils/expenseMapping.ts: Conversion and formatting utilities for expenses: converts between UI float amounts and backend bigint cents, formats currency strings with locale awareness, formats dates, and maps backend Expense objects to UI-friendly shapes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom color tokens using oklch CSS variables, extended border radii, box shadows, font families, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the app's existing features (currency selector, currency formatting), pending feature requests (backend currency preference field), and architectural notes for the Expense Tracker app.
